description_long: This object consists of three beds of varying sizes arranged side by side, each featuring a wooden frame with a curved headboard and a red comforter covering a white mattress. The beds are accompanied by a small wooden nightstand positioned next to the smallest bed. The headboards are slightly arched and finished in a light wood tone, contrasting with the darker base of the bed frames. The bedding is neatly arranged, with pillows visible at the head of each bed. The nightstand has a simple, boxy design with a flat top and no visible handles or drawers. The overall appearance suggests a coordinated set suitable for a residential or hospitality setting.
description: A set of three wooden beds with red comforters and white pillows, accompanied by a small wooden nightstand. The beds feature curved headboards and a coordinated, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three beds side by side with their curved headboards and the nightstand to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the beds, the thickness of the mattresses, and the position of the nightstand at the head of the beds.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the foot of the beds and the nightstand to the left, with the headboards less visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the beds' length, the arrangement of pillows, and the nightstand at the head of the beds.
